summary: Backend API testing completed successfully - all endpoints work perfectly locally with proper safety guards, response formats, and retry logic implementation. However, critical deployment issue persists: external URL still shows 'Preview Unavailable!!!' preventing all frontend and integration testing. Code implementation for safeFetch() and fetchWithRetry() appears correct based on code review.

critical_bugs.issue: External URL returns 404 for all API endpoints while backend works perfectly locally
critical_bugs.impact: Complete external API failure - no access to backend through public URL
critical_bugs.details: Backend server is running (supervisor shows RUNNING status) and all API endpoints work correctly locally. External URL https://ai-dev-brain-cferxrtx.preview.emergentagent.com/api/* returns 404. This is a deployment/routing configuration issue, not a code issue. The safeFetch() and fetchWithRetry() implementations in frontend code appear correct but cannot be tested due to deployment failure.
